requirement_text:
Requirement ID: csv_coupon_rule
Rules:
1. SAVE10 requires subtotal at least 50.
2. Only one coupon can be applied.

Requirement ID: csv_order_workflow
Rules:
1. An order starts in Draft.
2. Submit is allowed only from Draft and moves the order to Submitted.
3. Approve is allowed only from Submitted and moves the order to Approved.
